message:
fix(wire_protocol): prevent clock regression from making sessions appear stale

Use max() instead of direct assignment when updating session.last_seen_ms,
so a sender with a regressed clock cannot pull the timestamp backward.
This prevents the stale-session pruner from incorrectly evicting active
sessions. Add test that validates a regressed timestamp does not cause
premature session eviction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
